function.name: delegateTasksParallel
function.description: Create multiple delegated sub-agent tasks in parallel and optionally wait for the batch. Use when several subtasks are independent and can be fanned out together.

Tasks.description: List of delegated task specs to launch in parallel.

Task.description: Clear task description for this delegated child task.

AgentType.description: Optional agent specialization for this child task.

Context.description: Optional structured context for this child task.

Model.description: Optional model override for this child task.

MaxToolCalls.description: Optional tool-call budget for this child task.

TimeoutSeconds.description: Optional timeout budget for this child task.

Priority.description: Optional task priority for this child task.

UseCache.description: Optional cache toggle for this child task.

GroupLabel.description: Optional human-readable label for this delegated task batch.

WaitForCompletion.description: When true, wait until all delegated tasks finish, a task needs external input, or the timeout is reached.

TimeoutSeconds.description: Optional batch wait timeout in seconds when WaitForCompletion is true.

PollIntervalSeconds.description: Optional polling interval in seconds when WaitForCompletion is true.
